_doc: Home Assistant Plant Monitor configurations per bed. Thresholds are the most restrictive across all crops in each bed.

plants.name: Havn Bed A - His Bed

notes.min_moisture_from: pea-shoots (40% -- highest min among bed crops)
notes.max_moisture_from: lambs-ear (50% -- lowest max among bed crops)

plants.yaml_output:
# Plant Monitor for Bed A
plant:
  havn_bed_a:
    sensors:
      moisture: sensor.havn_bed_a_moisture
      temperature: sensor.havn_bed_a_temperature
    min_moisture: 40
    max_moisture: 50
    min_temperature: 0

plants.name: Havn Bed B - Raspberry Bed
plants.yaml_output:
# Plant Monitor for Bed B
plant:
  havn_bed_b:
    sensors:
      moisture: sensor.havn_bed_b_moisture
      temperature: sensor.havn_bed_b_temperature
    min_moisture: 25
    max_moisture: 65
    min_temperature: -15

plants.name: Havn Bed C - Shared Bed

notes.min_moisture_from: cucumber-mini-munch (45% -- highest min among bed crops)
notes.max_moisture_from: borage (65% -- lowest max among bed crops)
notes.min_temperature_from: cucumber-mini-munch (4C -- highest frost threshold, tied with basil and pepper)

plants.yaml_output:
# Plant Monitor for Bed C
plant:
  havn_bed_c:
    sensors:
      moisture: sensor.havn_bed_c_moisture
      temperature: sensor.havn_bed_c_temperature
    min_moisture: 45
    max_moisture: 65
    min_temperature: 4

plants.name: Havn Bed D - Terrace Herb Bed

notes.max_moisture_from: thyme (55% -- lowest max among bed crops)

plants.yaml_output:
# Plant Monitor for Bed D
plant:
  havn_bed_d:
    sensors:
      moisture: sensor.havn_bed_d_moisture
      temperature: sensor.havn_bed_d_temperature
    min_moisture: 40
    max_moisture: 55
    min_temperature: -3

plants.name: Havn Bed E - Terrace Flower Bed
plants.yaml_output:
# Plant Monitor for Bed E
plant:
  havn_bed_e:
    sensors:
      moisture: sensor.havn_bed_e_moisture
      temperature: sensor.havn_bed_e_temperature
    min_moisture: 40
    max_moisture: 65
    min_temperature: 2
